vibe: Warm, trustworthy, expert, empathetic, reducing dental anxiety

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Organic Asymmetry, High-end Editorial Feel

grid_patterns.name: Bento Asymmetry
grid_patterns.description: Used for 'Why choose us' and 'Services'. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-8).

buttons.primary: bg-[#0F3D5E] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#175078] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-[#0F3D5E] text-[#0F3D5E] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#0F3D5E] hover:text-white transition-colors

components_strategy.marketing_sections: Use raw HTML + Tailwind for structural creativity, overlapping images, and generous padding. No strict Shadcn cards for the main marketing sections.
components_strategy.icons: Use lucide-react for UI icons. Keep them soft and warm (e.g., using the accent_warm or primary colors).
components_strategy.interactions: Smooth hover lifts (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow increments. Fade-up entrances for text blocks.

sections_and_content.layout: Split asymmetric or side-by-side. Left side: Heavy typography, Right side: Large organic-shaped image or rounded rectangle.

content.h1: Tu sonrisa merece expertos que no se rinden.
content.subtitle: Especialistas en casos complejos con escáner intraoral y un trato humano que te hará olvidar el miedo.
content.trust_badge: ⭐ 4.8/5 estrellas en Google | Más de 20 años cuidando Burgos.

sections_and_content.layout: Grid of testimonial cards. Minimalist, high contrast text.
sections_and_content.content: Testimonials from Raquel González and Teodoro Campos highlighting trust and lack of pain.

sections_and_content.layout: Bento Grid. Mixing images and text blocks.
sections_and_content.content: Donde otros se rinden / Adiós al pánico dental (sedación consciente) / Precisión Digital (escáner intraoral) / Equipo humano.

sections_and_content.layout: Categorized cards by patient need, avoiding heavy medical jargon.
sections_and_content.content: Recuperar dientes / Sonrisa perfecta / Salud y mantenimiento / Eliminar dolor.

sections_and_content.layout: Editorial layout, large portraits, overlapping text 'Nos importas tú'.
sections_and_content.content: Team with names: Alberto, Jennifer, Teresa.

sections_and_content.layout: Dark background (primary color #0F3D5E) with light text for contrast.
sections_and_content.content: C. Azorín, 1, 09005 Burgos. Abiertos hasta las 22:00. Tel: 947 64 95 46. Mapa Google.

images.description: Modern warm dental clinic interior for hero section
Smiling female dentist portrait (Teresa - fallback image)

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Install and use 'Playfair Display' and 'Outfit' fonts via Google Fonts in index.html.
Implement a sticky/floating WhatsApp button fixed to the bottom right with WhatsApp brand color (#25D366).
Ensure the layout feels 'Organic & Earthy' (Archetype 1) - use warm beige/off-white backgrounds, not stark white everywhere. Absolutely NO purple or cold hospital blues.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all CTA buttons, links, and forms.
Make sure all CTA buttons directly link to the phone number or WhatsApp (e.g., href='tel:+34947649546' or href='https://wa.me/34947649546').
Build a mobile-first responsive layout, as most users will be searching 'dentista Burgos' on their phones.
